gpu: ANGLE/SwiftShader (software GL, headless Chromium) — absolute fps is lower than real GPU; the O(1) history-independence property is the substantive gate
latency_note: p95 of pan rAF frame intervals — an upper bound on input→frame for a dirty-driven loop. True CDP present-timestamp is not readable in headless SwiftShader (noted per task).

history_independence.verdict: PASS — frame cost is ~constant in history depth (v1 1-fps bug structurally gone)
